question1.description:
A team is developing a web system using MVC. During a meeting, the developer states that the interface can be changed without modifying the core business rules.
This characteristic is mainly related to which quality attribute?

question2.description:
A banking system was organized into layers. Financial rules were isolated from the interface and the database, making testing and responsibility control easier.
Which characteristic of layered architecture is being applied?

question3.description:
A company uses a Client-Server architecture in its sales system. One day, the main server failed and all clients were unable to access the system.
This scenario mainly represents a problem related to:
